which is helpful to reduce the cost of the technological revolu-
                                                                                                                         tion; technological innovation is the interaction between man
                                                                                                                         and nature and is the human act to transform nature and protect
                                                                                                                         the environment, which is helpful to reduce production costs.
                                                                                                                         Development-oriented finance adheres to theoretical innovation,
                                                                                                                         institutional innovation, policy innovation, product innovation,
                                                                                                                         and establishing financial theory with Chinese characteristics.
                                                                                                                         We should establish modern credit system from the optimiza-
                                                                                                                         tion of microeconomic behavior, in order to explore new ideas
                                                                                                                         for economic development.
